top_signals.title: Copper Retreats as US and Iran Trade Threats on Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Copper slumped as traders awaited the next developments in the Middle East, with the potential for renewed hostilities pushing up oil prices and hurting sentiment in equities markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia slips after earnings, SpaceX & OpenAI IPOs in focus | The Asia Trade 5/21/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ubisoft shares plunge 14% after Assassin’s Creed maker warns of annual profit loss
top_signals.summary: Ubisoft shares plunged on Thursday after the Assassin's Creed maker warned of further losses this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US sanctions Sinaloa Cartel-linked cash-to-crypto laundering network tied to fentanyl trafficking
top_signals.summary: OFAC sanctioned a Sinaloa Cartel-linked cash-to-crypto network accused of laundering fentanyl proceeds through cryptocurrency transfers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
